programme.title: Fast Money Rpt
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America's post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: Unlocked
programme.desc: Unlocked is a home tour series focused on how much people across the globe spend on their housing, what they get for the money and what they had to sacrifice to make it happen. CNBC opens the doors to unique homes and introduces you to the people inside so you can see what it's like to live there and exactly how much it costs.

programme.title: E12 - The Search For Noah's Ark
programme.desc: It's one of the most famous stories from the Bible: God sends a flood to wipe out nearly every living thing on Earth, except for Noah, his family, and the animals he saves in his fabled ark.

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About Malaysia
programme.desc: Think you know Malaysia? Think again. Ezra Zaid will take you on a journey to explore and discover the unexpected sides. Uncover twists behind the historical tales, figures and places you thought you knew.

programme.title: E9 - Beer Necessities
programme.desc: A German immigrant looks to revolutionise the American beer industry when he's handed a struggling brewery. Destined to overcome technological drawbacks and the rise of temperance and prohibition.

programme.title: E16 - Mysteries Of The Missing Link
programme.desc: Today, human civilisation spans the globe, and there are more than 7 billion people on Earth. But how did humanity evolve? Were there other kinds of human-like creatures?

programme.title: E17 - Surviving The Impossible
programme.desc: Humans can survive catastrophic injuries and deadly scenarios that defy the odds in ways that are inexplicable. Is cheating death when survival is seemingly impossible simply fate or good fortune?

Goodbye Dear Eel Friends
programme.desc: When Wapiti's eel friends get trapped on their journey downstream, the kids use hydropower to help them on their way.

programme.title: Brilliant Body Temperature
programme.desc: There is a snake in the lab as Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand explore how body temperature works. And new twin doctors Dan and Raph bust some urban myths about how to stay healthy.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Rainbow
programme.desc: Henry meets a colourful Rainbow, and he turns into a Leprechaun so he can slide down Rainbow and discover the pot of gold!

programme.title: Sea Lamprey
programme.desc: Daddy Owl and Tiny Owl are impressed by the rock-moving abilities of the sea lamprey. And Grandad recalls when he shared a flat with an old lamprey called Gilly.

programme.title: The Pitmans: Martial Arts Dynamic Duo
programme.desc: Lisa and Chris Pitman are a married couple who hold the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most concrete blocks broken in thirty seconds by a mixed team of two. The couple shares what it takes to become the best in the world in martial arts.

programme.title: Brilliant Body Temperature
programme.desc: There is a snake in the lab as Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand explore how body temperature works. And new twin doctors Dan and Raph bust some urban myths about how to stay healthy.

programme.title: Hopes and Dreams
programme.desc: The Icicles have made it to the World Synchro Championships and are heading to Canada. After a season of flawless performances, can the girls pull off their Bollywood routine? The end of season Gala is near, but preparations aren't running as smoothly as everyone hoped.

programme.title: The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts go on an adventure to match a lost tooth to its owner.

programme.title: ColourXplosion
programme.desc: Eric learns that if you want to create different paint colours, all you have to do is mix your paints. As long as you have the primary colours – red, blue, and yellow – you can create lots of new shades.

programme.title: Heart of a Lion
programme.desc: Ice hockey player Liam takes on men twice his age in an action-packed match, the Icicles are put through their paces at the dress rehearsal for a big competition, and solo skaters Kloe and Beccy head to the British Championships.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers take a cable car to the peak of Table Mountain National Park to discover more about the incredible plant and animal life there. Then they have the adventure of a lifetime when they go abseiling down its vertical cliffs.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Trip to Siberia
programme.desc: While Zoe and Milo warm up inside, Alim suggests skating. The kids doubt it's possible in such cold. To prove them wrong, Alim takes them to Siberia. There, Sergei shows them Siberian life-permafrost, stilt houses, and melting ice for water.

programme.title: Trip to South Korea
programme.desc: Zoe's mum doesn't like cakes, so Zoe isn't sure what to make for her birthday. Alim suggests visiting their penfriend Kachiko, who lives in South Korea. They meet up with her on the beach.

programme.title: Goodbye Dear Eel Friends
programme.desc: When Wapiti's eel friends get trapped on their journey downstream, the kids use hydropower to help them on their way.

programme.title: Towel
programme.desc: Why throw the old towels away? Upcycling and reusing are Hepi and Briko's favourite thing to do

programme.title: Rope
programme.desc: Summertime is here! Hepi and Briko have the perfect plan to re use all this rope we have lying around.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Ghostly Go Kart
programme.desc: When Kevin's new radio-controlled model car starts acting like it has a bad-tempered mind of its own, he becomes convinced that it is haunted and asks Addison to help.

programme.title: Bucket
programme.desc: No place to sit? Do not worry, we have the most creative solution for you!

programme.title: Trip to Ecuador
programme.desc: Zoe's avocado tree is not in good shape, and she doesn't know how to revive it. Our friends travel to Ecuador, where they meet Idzi. He has a fabulous garden and a particular way to tend it.

programme.title: Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: It's ‘toy drive' time, but Oto is having a hard time parting with anything – even a little old toy plane he forgot he had. Anabella thinks the plane is worthless, but Oto thinks it's valuable! Is Oto's plane junk, or a treasure?

programme.title: If at First You Don't Succeed
programme.desc: Elephant is happily eating his morning helping of seeds. Happy, that is, until he spots a much bigger meal in a tree high overhead. He will do anything to get to the enticing fruit, even change the evolution of trees.

programme.title: Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: It's ‘toy drive' time, but Oto is having a hard time parting with anything – even a little old toy plane he forgot he had. Anabella thinks the plane is worthless, but Oto thinks it's valuable! Is Oto's plane junk, or a treasure?

programme.title: ColourXplosion
programme.desc: Eric learns that if you want to create different paint colours, all you have to do is mix your paints. As long as you have the primary colours – red, blue, and yellow – you can create lots of new shades.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Bear
programme.desc: Henry meets a Bear in the woods. He becomes a Park Ranger and reads Bear a bedtime story to help him get sleepy for hibernation.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: So Close
programme.desc: Amelie spends precious time with her family, while the Acrobatic gymnasts have a crucial competition and will have a chance to win a place at the World Championships in Belgium.

programme.title: Trip to Ecuador
programme.desc: Zoe's avocado tree is not in good shape, and she doesn't know how to revive it. Our friends travel to Ecuador, where they meet Idzi. He has a fabulous garden and a particular way to tend it.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Ghostly Go Kart
programme.desc: When Kevin's new radio-controlled model car starts acting like it has a bad-tempered mind of its own, he becomes convinced that it is haunted and asks Addison to help.

programme.title: Bucket
programme.desc: No place to sit? Do not worry, we have the most creative solution for you!

programme.title: Brilliant Body Temperature
programme.desc: There is a snake in the lab as Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand explore how body temperature works. And new twin doctors Dan and Raph bust some urban myths about how to stay healthy.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: It's ‘toy drive' time, but Oto is having a hard time parting with anything – even a little old toy plane he forgot he had. Anabella thinks the plane is worthless, but Oto thinks it's valuable! Is Oto's plane junk, or a treasure?

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: 12.12: THE DAY
programme.desc: After the assassination of President Park, martial law has been declared. A coup d'etat bursts out by Defense Security Commander CHUN Doo-gwang and a private band of officers following him. Capital Defense Commander LEE Tae-shin, an obstinate soldier who believes the military should not take political actions, fights against CHUN Doo-gwang to stop him. The conflict between the two grows while military leaders are holding their decision and Defense Minister is gone. In the midst of chaos, the spring of Seoul that everyone longed for heads to unexpected direction.

programme.title: Beyond The Sin
programme.desc: One rainy night, the dead body of a girl, the only daughter of Hong Kong police Yin Lok, is found in the wild. Polices based on clues, suspect has been identified. However, several more girls are murdered and murder cases keep happening. Yin begins to investigate his daughter's death and met a mentally retarded girls, he is looking for more clues from this special girl. Finally, Yin is getting closer to the truth...

programme.title: Reign of Assassins
programme.desc: In 428AD, Bodhi, Prince of Southern India, becomes a Buddhist monk and sets off for China, earning a hallowed reputation as a mystical martial artist. Following his death, his remains mysteriously disappear. It is rumored that his remains contain the secret to obtaining limitless power and ruling the martial arts world. Centuries later, The Dark Stone emerges as a team of deadly assassins; their best assassin is the ruthless, invincible Drizzle. On her latest mission, Drizzle takes out Zhang Haiduan, a high-ranking court official. Zhang's son, Renfeng, while mourning his father's death, is also attacked and seemingly killed by Drizzle and her fellow assassins. Drizzle's life changes when she kills Lu Zhu, a monk with whom she has unintentionally fallen in love...

programme.title: I Want To Be Rich
programme.desc: Success in business, having a happy family, and being a rich one is what most people wish for. This is also the wish of the young man A Hwa! Those who are hardworking, responsible and know how to be grateful will surely be rich and become wealthy!

programme.title: After School
programme.desc: The year is 1994. As the life-changing college examination looms on the horizon for Heng and his two best friends, they spend their days pulling pranks at their cram school, obsessing over sex and stressing over their uncertain futures. However, the cram school's new tutor, Teacher Chih, manages to tame the wild trio and helps them discover their true selves.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E262 -Night King
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

Abandoned Fish Farms Turn Into Plastic Traps Underwater
programme.desc: Below the surface, collapsing fish farms turn nets and cages into deadly plastic traps. Divers reveal how risky and complex the cleanup really is.

programme.title: Abolish Prisons? - What Works Better Than Incarceration
programme.desc: Approximately 58,000 people are currently incarcerated in German prisons. Over half of them reoffend after their release. These statistics raise doubts about the prison system. Is something fundamentally wrong with German prisons?

programme.title: Explore Abandoned Spas And Death-Defying Cable Cars In Georgia
programme.desc: If you love urban exploration, forgotten architecture, and the stories hidden in decay, then Georgia should be your next adventure destination. DW's Anja Koch takes you to two of the country's most haunting lost places: Tskaltubo, a once-grand Soviet spa town with abandoned sanatoriums, and Chiatura, a former mining city where eerie, rusting cable cars cling to the cliffs.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.title: E59
programme.desc: It's the Semi Final and the Top 3 MasterChef contestants face a mammoth, three-course service challenge. Only two will make it through to the Grand Finale.

programme.title: E2 - Sensory Overload
programme.desc: In this episode, host Michael Yo takes viewers on five mind-blowing dining adventures that push the limits of imagination and exceed all culinary expectations!

programme.title: E59
programme.desc: It's the Semi Final and the Top 3 MasterChef contestants face a mammoth, three-course service challenge. Only two will make it through to the Grand Finale.

programme.title: E3 - Underground
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo goes beneath it all to find five of the most unusual dining adventures below and beyond! Dive down twenty feet under the sea for North Atlantic seafood in Norway.

programme.title: E15 - Cajun Chicken Confit With Pickled Fennel
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and “dirty pasta”.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, Parsley sings a rock song.

programme.desc: It's a windy day and the Teletubbies collect lots of leaves that have blown off the trees. The leaves go everywhere in Home Dome, so The Noo---noo cleans up.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Unsolved Cases (Final)
programme.desc: NHK Special's iconic series 'Unsolved Cases' becomes a standalone program! Through in-depth investigations, the series explores a wide range of cases-from historic incidents that shook society to mysterious local crimes that cast long shadows over communities, both in Japan and abroad. Each episode reveals the enduring impact of these cases on contemporary society and uncovers valuable lessons for the future.

E7 - Campus Chaos
programme.desc: Australian universities are in turmoil. Deep cuts to jobs and courses are triggering fury on campuses. Years of shrinking public funding, rising debt and increasingly corporate decision-making pushed some to breaking point.

programme.title: Mystify Michael Hutchence
programme.desc: A journey into the heart and soul of Michael Hutchence, lead-singer of INXS, a complex and shy man who spent much of his life in the public eye, rarely revealing his true self to anyone except his very close friends.

programme.title: E7 - Autumn: Cottage Gardening & Custard Apples
programme.desc: Sophie explores a cooling cottage garden, Josh visits a bushfood expert's accessible backyard, Guest Presenter Thanh the Fruit Nerd delves into custard apples, and we meet a plant scientist creating beautiful city landscapes.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Chef Massimo Mele heads out to sea in search of the highly prized South Rock Lobster. Bringing this culinary journey to a delightful close, Massimo ends on a sweet note with two family favourites: panna cotta and zeppole.

programme.title: God's Influencer: Saint Carlo Acutis
programme.desc: Presented by ABS-CBN Current Affairs, 'God's Influencer' shares the extraordinary life and digital evangelism of Carlo Acutis, the world's first millennial saint, through the eyes of the Filipinos who are actively championing his devotion. From priests, youth, and even children, they recount powerful personal stories-including visits to his tomb and attending the canonization rites-detailing how this young religious teenager, the “Patron Saint of the Internet”, inspired and made a mark in their lives.

programme.title: Premier League 25/26 -Aston Villa vs West Ham United
Premier League 25/26 -Aston Villa vs West Ham United
Premier League 25/26 -Aston Villa vs West Ham United
E6
programme.desc: 以美食公司為背景，通過王大蔚等七名角色的職場成長線與三對CP的情感線，展現年輕人工作與生活的酸甜苦辣；劇情採用「貪吃蛇」結構來觀眾展現了7名主角的內心世界，搭配美食隱喻與事件反轉，展現角色互幫互助完成大型直播活動的過程。

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E11 - 墨爾本男嘉賓再赴尋愛之約
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E16 - 心動告白
programme.desc: 以山野為背景，10位素人嘉賓都攜帶一個秘密進入「真相小屋」，這些秘密可能涉及過去的傷痛、未了的心願等，隨著節目推進逐漸揭曉；秘密成為推動他們情感發展的關鍵因素，也增加了未知性和驚喜感，並放棄了傳統戀綜依賴觀察室嘉賓或專家解析的模式，讓觀眾直接充當觀察者。

programme.title: E11 - 墨爾本男嘉賓再赴尋愛之約
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E16 - 心動告白
programme.desc: 以山野為背景，10位素人嘉賓都攜帶一個秘密進入「真相小屋」，這些秘密可能涉及過去的傷痛、未了的心願等，隨著節目推進逐漸揭曉；秘密成為推動他們情感發展的關鍵因素，也增加了未知性和驚喜感，並放棄了傳統戀綜依賴觀察室嘉賓或專家解析的模式，讓觀眾直接充當觀察者。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 以美食公司為背景，通過王大蔚等七名角色的職場成長線與三對CP的情感線，展現年輕人工作與生活的酸甜苦辣；劇情採用「貪吃蛇」結構來觀眾展現了7名主角的內心世界，搭配美食隱喻與事件反轉，展現角色互幫互助完成大型直播活動的過程。

programme.title: E1 - 任賢齊引發懷舊熱潮
programme.desc: 每集由一位原唱歌手對抗三位金曲守護人，以自己的非主打歌與主打歌同台PK，通過現場500位大眾聽審的投票決定挑戰是否成功。原唱歌手包括任賢齊、鄭少秋、吳克群、周筆暢、鄧紫棋、李克勤、趙傳、蔡健雅、許美靜、許茹芸等。

programme.title: E4 - Stephane Bonnat's Mexico
programme.desc: Master chocolate-maker, heir to a tradition dating back to the 18th century, Stephane Bonnat takes us to explore his lands in Mexico, source of his cocoa beans, before discovering the finished product in Voiron, Isere. From bean to bar, all you ever wanted to know about a great chocolate.

programme.title: E88
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E5 - Ken Belanger, Mountain Guide In Japan
programme.desc: Ken Belanger is a mountain guide and off-piste skiing specialist on Hokkaido, Japan's most northerly island. He welcomes five skiers who have come to live an extraordinary experience in this powder snow paradise. The group climb Mount Asahi, the island's highest peak.

programme.title: E6 - Sylvie Brassard, Kitesurfing Guide In Australia
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E13 - New At The Salon Des Antiquaires
programme.desc: The Fab Paris fair brings together antique dealers and art merchants around a wide range of works spanning from Antiquity to the present day, highlighting the richness and diversity of the French market. Also, a stroll through the Passage du Grand Cerf, a gem of the 2nd arrondissement, where specialty shops and unusual objects coexist.

Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E6 - Sylvie Brassard, Kitesurfing Guide In Australia
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.title: E4 - Stephane Bonnat's Mexico
programme.desc: Master chocolate-maker, heir to a tradition dating back to the 18th century, Stephane Bonnat takes us to explore his lands in Mexico, source of his cocoa beans, before discovering the finished product in Voiron, Isere. From bean to bar, all you ever wanted to know about a great chocolate.

programme.desc: When a masked madman who wants to destroy India steals a dangerous weapon, two elite soldiers must work together to recover it.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E5 - Jungle Juniors
programme.desc: Every year, more than 200,000 monkeys in Peru are trafficked illegally. Almost all are babies. Watch as these little ones learn to survive without their moms and try to make new friends along the way.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E4 - Beast Buddies
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

TATA IPL 2026 -Highlights: M5: LSG vs DC
E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Get ready to welcome some new Magic Pets with Mila & Morphle! The adventure begins when they meet Shrubcub, a pet whose power is to make plants grow, causing a huge flowery jungle to bloom in Pet Port! Then, they meet Slushyseal, who can change items into juice pops, but the friends have to stop him when he starts turning all the trees & flowers into frozen treats! From a pet that swaps bodies to one that hypnotizes animals, it's a day full of new & magical friends!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Teamwork & Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a big day of teamwork & fixes at Gecko's Garage! When the Mechanicals accidentally injure Gecko's foot, they must learn the value of teamwork to finish repairing Bobby the Bus by themselves. Then, when Green Mechanical gets stressed, Gecko teaches her mindfulness tips to calm down. The teamwork continues as Gecko helps his rival, Mr. Weasel, fix an engine with a clean electric one, & the whole crew works together to repair Trevor the Tractor's giant gears!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E2 - Learning How to Be a Good Friend!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns how to be a good friend! When a new, shy student named Ash the firetruck joins the school, Buster sees he's all alone & invites him to play. Then, Buster learns another important lesson when he starts to lose a game of snakes & ladders & decides to cheat. From learning that sports aren't all about winning to standing up for his friends during a sleepover, Buster is on his way to being the best friend ever!

programme.title: E1 - Awesome Animal Facts!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning awesome facts about all kinds of animals! He & D.BO travel back in time to meet the biggest dinosaurs, like the Argentinosaurus, & even try to keep a T-Rex as a pet for a day! Back in the present, they shrink down to count a shark's teeth with a pilot fish dentist. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how elephants use their trunks to keep cool & discovers why cats have whiskers from a local feline celebrity.

programme.title: E6 - When I Grow Up I Want To Be!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns about all the things he can be when he grows up! His adventure starts with a school trip to the fire station, where the kids learn what to do in an emergency & how firefighters are true superheroes! Then, he learns about all the different community helpers, like police officers & doctors. The learning continues as he discovers all about traffic lights & road safety while playing with his new toy car.

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Favorite Classic Sing-Alongs!
programme.desc: Get ready to dance to all of JJ's favorite classic sing-alongs! Try to keep up as the kids groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' going a little bit faster with each verse! Then, have fun tumbling off the stage as they play a silly game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The party continues as they play the 'Who Took the Cookie?' game & march along to 'John Jacob Jingleheimer Schmidt.' It's a dance party full of timeless, interactive fun!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E5 - Twinkle Bedtime Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: Company
programme.desc: Chandu and Mallik team up to form a gang that quickly earns a reputation. But as egos clash and trust fades, tension builds, leading to betrayal and the gang's downfall. Release Year: 2002 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: In rural India, an honest police officer takes on brutal caste crimes, risking his life and career as he challenges corruption, violence, and deep-rooted injustice. Release Year: 2019 Director: Anubhav Sinha Awards: Best Director Critics- Anubhav Sinha, Best Actor Critics- Ayushmann Khurrana

programme.title: Company
programme.desc: Chandu and Mallik team up to form a gang that quickly earns a reputation. But as egos clash and trust fades, tension builds, leading to betrayal and the gang's downfall. Release Year: 2002 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E37

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E41 - B. The Puppy/The Name/The Extras/The Gripes/The Vacation
programme.desc: The kids finally get the puppy they always wanted, except, it's actually a turtle, and it hates them!

programme.title: E48 - Cool Bikes/House Rules
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby beat Muscle Man and High-Five Ghost in a cart race, and pick up some girls who have some flat tires.

programme.title: E9 - A. Queen of the Black Puddle/Courage the Fly/Tulip's Worm/Night of the Scarecrow/Shad
programme.desc: After a rainstorm, a puddle queen materializes at the farm. She woos Eustace and drags him down into her puddle world. Muriel is heartbroken, of course, so Courage must save Eustace.

programme.title: E14 - A. Loyalty to the King/Blood Under the Skin/It Came from the Nightosphere/The Eyes/St
programme.desc: There's a new 'Nice King' in Ooo, and he looks kinda like someone else we know.

programme.title: E1 - Rollercoaster Renovation
programme.desc: Heide Park Soltau, a german adventure park, offers adrenaline junkies many attractions and rides. The biggest crowd puller is the Colossos wooden roller coaster - the highest and fastest wooden roller coaster in Europe. But over twenty million passengers in fifteen years are taking their toll. The ride closes temporarily and renovation work begins. It is a gigantic task - 1500 metres of track have to be renewed. A complete replacement of all wooden rails has never been done on a comparable facility before. It is a renovation of superlatives for 12.5 million euros. The team is working with the heavy components at heights of up to 60 metres. Safety technology and its correct application are vital. The reopening date is approaching and the pressure is mounting.

programme.title: E7 - Scoreless
programme.desc: Using a unique method to crack a safe, Nick Wells (Robert De Niro) uses a blowtorch to cut through a safe, fill it with water, and blow the door off using a small explosive device. We test this, along with the effects of a 20mm antitank rifle on a safe from the movie Thuderbolt and Lightfoot.

programme.title: E4 - Schooled by a Girl Scout
programme.desc: When a 13-year-old girl scout needs help earning a primitive camping skills badge, Bear Grylls flies to the rescue… literally. Beth’s wisdom for life and the outdoors is beyond her years, but nothing can prepare her for what challenges bear has in store for this adventure.

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: The Banquet
programme.desc: “The Banquet” assembled star-studded cast that aimed for charity to support disaster relief efforts at that time. Adapted from the 1959 Cantonese film of the same name and co-directed by Tsui Hark, Clifton Ko, Joe Cheung, and Alfred Cheung, the film tells the story of a greedy couple deceiving their estranged father to secure a huge amount business deal with oil producing country. While they pretend to welcome the father into their home and prepare a birthday banquet for him, rival also throws a competing banquet...With continuous top-star cameos offering countless surprises and laughs, this film remains remarkable, entertaining and meaningful to audience nowadays.
